checklist_items.title: Implement code hash verification for Reward Vault contracts
checklist_items.description: Verify that the system includes validation checks on the Reward Vault's code hash before validators can direct emissions, such as automated audits or community review.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no validation of Reward Vault integrity when validators direct emissions
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement validation checks on the Reward Vault's integrity before directing emissions, potentially involving community review or automated audits
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit logs or code review demonstrating Reward Vault validation process before emission direction.

checklist_items.title: Implement a public and verifiable logging system for $BGT emission directions
checklist_items.description: Set up a logging mechanism to track validator $BGT emission directions to ensure transparency and accountability.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Validators can deny having directed emissions if not adequately tracked.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a publicly verifiable logging system for $BGT emission directions by validators.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review of logging system implementation, demonstrating publicly verifiable logs of emission directions.

checklist_items.title: Implement integrity checks for Incentive Tokens offered by Token Managers
checklist_items.description: Check that integrity checks and secure communication channels are in place between Token Managers and Reward Vaults to prevent tampering with Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There are no integrity checks on the Incentive Tokens offered by the Token Manager.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement integrity checks and secure communication channels between the Token Manager and the Reward Vault.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and penetration testing reports verifying the integrity of Incentive Token transfers.

checklist_items.title: Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms for Token Managers
checklist_items.description: Verify the existence of authentication and authorization mechanisms to verify the identity of Token Managers and to validate the origin of Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no authentication mechanism to verify the identity of the Token Manager.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms to verify the Token Manager's identity and validate the origin of Incentive Tokens.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and penetration testing reports confirming authentication and authorization for Token Managers.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication and authorization for proposal creation
checklist_items.description: Ensure governance contracts strongly verify the identity of the proposal creator before the proposal is submitted.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Governance contracts do not sufficiently verify the identity of the proposal creator.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication and authorization mechanisms for proposal creation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating authentication checks on proposal submissions.

checklist_items.title: Implement end-to-end encryption and signature verification for votes
checklist_items.description: Establish secure mechanisms to ensure votes are recorded accurately and immutably and that voting system is not vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no mechanism to ensure votes are recorded accurately and immutably.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement end-to-end encryption and signature verification for votes.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review demonstrating signature verification for votes.

checklist_items.title: Implement strong authentication for boosting transactions
checklist_items.description: Verify that there is strong authentication and authorization mechanism in place for the booster, ensuring that the user identity is verified before allowing a boost.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: There is no strong authentication or authorization mechanism in place for the booster.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication for boosting transactions. Verify user identity before allowing a boost.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review and testing reports demonstrating the authentication process for boosting.

checklist_items.title: Implement thorough input validation on the BeraHub smart contracts for $BGT boosting
checklist_items.description: Validate the amount of $BGT being used for boosting. Implement secure coding practices to prevent transaction manipulation.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BeraHub component does not properly validate the amount of $BGT being used for boosting.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement thorough input validation on the BeraHub smart contracts. Use secure coding practices to prevent transaction manipulation.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and test cases showing the input validation process.

checklist_items.title: Implement strict validation and monitoring of whitelisted collateral assets for $HONEY minting
checklist_items.description: Validate the collateral that is being deposited. Continuously monitor the collateral to ensure there are not any vulnerabilities.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The HoneyFactory contract doesn't have sufficient checks on the collateral being deposited.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strict validation and monitoring of whitelisted collateral assets.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review audit logs, code review and penetration testing reports that verify input validation.

checklist_items.title: Implement gas limit management and rate limiting for $HONEY minting
checklist_items.description: To prevent a denial of service, ensure gas limits are managed and rate limiting is used for minting $HONEY.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The HoneyFactory contract lacks proper gas limit management.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement gas limit management and rate limiting for minting $HONEY.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review config files, test and penetration reports to demonstrate gas limit and rate limiting.

checklist_items.title: Implement privacy-enhancing technologies to obfuscate transaction data on the Berachain Bridge
checklist_items.description: Implement privacy-enhancing technologies such as zero-knowledge proofs to obfuscate transaction data.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Berachain Bridge publicly exposes transaction details.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement privacy-enhancing technologies to obfuscate transaction data.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review design documents and penetration test reports that use privacy-enhancing technologies.

checklist_items.title: Implement robust input validation and sanitization mechanisms within the BeraHub component for $BGT delegation
checklist_items.description: Malicious BGT holders could attempt to manipulate the delegation process to unfairly benefit certain validators or disrupt the intended distribution of rewards.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BeraHub component does not have sufficient input validation or sanitization mechanisms in place.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust input validation and sanitization mechanisms within the BeraHub component.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Code review, penetration testing reports to demonstrate input validation.

checklist_items.title: Implement multi-factor authentication and hardware wallet support for delegation transactions
checklist_items.description: To prevent against a malicious third party impersonating a $BGT holder, ensure there are multiple layers of authentication.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Lack of robust authentication mechanisms on the BeraHub component.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement multi-factor authentication and hardware wallet support for delegation transactions.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit report and code review demonstrating that there are multiple forms of authentication.

checklist_items.title: Implement rate limiting and resource management mechanisms within the BeraHub component
checklist_items.description: An attacker could flood the system with numerous delegation requests, causing the BeraHub component to become unresponsive or unavailable. Rate limiting will mitigate this.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The BeraHub component does not have adequate rate limiting or resource management mechanisms in place.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement rate limiting and resource management mechanisms within the BeraHub component to prevent resource exhaustion.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Review config files, test and penetration reports to demonstrate gas limit and rate limiting.
